headline: One of Wall Street’s Fiercest Activist Investors Is in Ohio
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery  had rebuffed several bids from Paramount and was plowing ahead with a deal with  Netflix  when a fed up activist investor arrived.  Ancora Holdings, a private-wealth adviser from the Cleveland area with a small activism shop, has been one of the noisiest activist investors recently, filling the void as big-name activists pull back on public fights.  Ancora has run more than 30 public campaigns in the past six years, targeting companies including  Norfolk Southern  and  Kohl’s  often with pointed attacks from its activism specialist and bulldog-in-chief,  Jim Chadwick.
